Founded by July “La Gunny” Franco, a proud U.S. Marine, our mission is to empower, uplift, and represent those who serve. At just 17, July Franco earned the title of United States Marine, but found that the gear available did not fit or represent her. After 23 years of waiting for change, she created the solution: Gunny Gear — apparel that reflects resilience, pride, and the spirit of service. Gunny Gear is more than clothing.
